items.sentence: Ashish Vaswani et al. (2017) introduced the Transformer, a novel neural network architecture for sequence transduction tasks. It replaces traditional RNNs/CNNs with an attention-only mechanism, demonstrating superior quality, parallelizability, and reduced training time in machine translation.
